conviction_board.name: Axis Bank
conviction_board.narrative: AXISBANK scores 57/100 on our engine. The setup is building. Price is above the 50 and 200-day averages — the foundation is there, it just needs follow-through. The momentum profile is constructive. RSI at 59 means the move is early-to-mid phase, not late innings. Market headwinds are real — 42% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Banking is lagging the broader tape (score 30) — an extra headwind. Bull case: momentum carries to ₹1,381 if volume confirms. Bear case: fades below ₹1,253 — failed rally territory. Range-bound between ₹1,278 and ₹1,349. Patience over conviction. Verdict: BUY. Entry zone near ₹1,324 — let the trend work. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Mildly Bullish.
